items.title: RT by @WhiteHouse: .@VP departs for Switzerland: "I'm looking forward to starting the technical talks with the Iranians, the Pakistanis, and the Qataris... We're going to hopefully make progress on the nuclear issue, make progress on the Lebanon ceasefire issue — those are the two big things that I think we're going to be focused on."
items.summary:
.@VP departs for Switzerland: "I'm looking forward to starting the technical talks with the Iranians, the Pakistanis, and the Qataris... We're going to hopefully make progress on the nuclear issue, make progress on the Lebanon ceasefire issue — those are the two big things that I think we're going to be focused on."

Video

items.title:
RT by @WhiteHouse: VP Vance on @POTUS’s commitment to long term peace: 

“He’s thinking about this for my kids’ sake, for our grandkids’ sake, to ensure that you never have this regime with the ability to develop a nuclear weapon.”
items.summary:

items.title:
For millions of people forced to flee war, conflict and persecution, protection can mean the difference between life and death.

Amid growing global challenges, the right to seek safety matters more than ever.

Saturday is #WorldRefugeeDay.

https://www.unhcr.org/until-everyone-is-safe via @Refugees
